prompt: Theme direction: Oriental Zen minimalist poster Style branch: High-contrast communication style Subject content: Silhouette of a person standing in front of a long wall swinging a brush to write Emotional motif: expression, momentum, sobriety, literary tension Scenes and imagery: Cream-white long wall, cobalt blue large-area white space, bright orange seal mark, person and brushstroke ink lines Composition and space: Off-center composition, the person is located on one side, the long wall forms a large area of white space, and the writing action brings out a longitudinal or diagonal visual line of movement Color control: Cream-white is used as the wall and main white space base, cobalt blue is used for local background blocks or shadow layers, bright orange is only used for small-area marks, pen tail highlights or seal positions, and the character is a black ink silhouette; avoid excessive dyeing of the wall surface Light and texture: Natural light, paper wall texture, clear ink lines, light grain, modern cultural poster feel Frame ratio: 9:16 Supplementary requirements: The movement should be powerful but the picture remains minimalist, suitable for posters with a strong sense of culture and title.
